description_long: This shotgun features a robust, elongated body with a deep reddish-brown finish and black accents along the receiver and grip. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a ribbed section near the muzzle and a prominent sight at the top. The stock is replaced by a pistol grip, which is ergonomically shaped and features a trigger guard with a rounded, reinforced design. The fore-end appears to be a pump mechanism, with visible grooves for grip and manipulation. The receiver is detailed with rails and mechanical components, suggesting modularity and tactical use. Overall, the shotgun has a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a long barrel, reddish-brown body, black pistol grip, and pump-action fore-end. It features a ribbed barrel, prominent sight, and reinforced trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, ribbed barrel, and narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, pump fore-end, black pistol grip, and sight on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the pump and grip more visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long with ribbing near the muzzle and a prominent sight
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, reinforced trigger guard with a moderate size and ergonomic shaping
